primary_checksum.input_description: Sorted (window_start:close) pairs from mnq_candles, one per line, format: '{window_start_ns}:{close_decimal}\n'
primary_checksum.sort_order: ORDER BY window_start ASC, ticker ASC

per_contract_checksums.note: Individual contract checksums not computed in this version. Use primary checksum for verification.

verification_procedure: Run scripts/verify.mjs from the atlas-nexus project directory. The script will query mnq_candles, compute the SHA-256 checksum using the same algorithm, and compare against the value above.
